title: H2C.org Launches the Worldâ€™s First Global Market for Green Hydrogen Certificates
content: H2C.org is launching the first global market and registry for the international trade in green hydrogen certificates. Following in the footsteps of renewable energy and sustainable aviation fuel registries, H2C.org enables the green premiums and carbon removal rights of green hydrogen to be sold discretely from each ton of fuel.
author: Analysts Account
